inputs.rider_context: Rider operational record for the past 30 days: delivery completion rate 87% (13% incomplete or returned). Average delivery time 23 minutes per order against a zone benchmark of 19 minutes. Two incident reports filed: one customer complaint regarding delayed delivery, one order marked as undelivered with no explanation logged. Operating zone: city center. Total active shifts in period: 22. No formal disputes or appeals on record. Rider has been active on the platform for 8 months. No prior formal warnings.
inputs.role_context: City center delivery zone. Standard delivery SLA: 20 minutes average. Zone traffic conditions: high congestion during peak hours (12:00-14:00, 18:00-20:00). Platform policy: completion rate below 90% triggers operational review. Two or more incidents in a 30-day period requires documented review by operations team.
